PreToolUse.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/\bgit\s+push\b/.test(cmd)){console.error('[Hook] BLOCKED: git push requires pre-push review first.');console.error('Checklist: cargo test, clippy, fmt, grep unwrap/println/dbg, commit message format.');console.error('Report findings to user. User pushes — not Claude.');process.exit(2)}console.log(d)})"
PreToolUse.description: Block git push — pre-push review required, user pushes
